name: I'm A Celebrity... Unpacked (South Africa)
overview: I'm A Celebrity... Unpacked is your place to get MORE of your favourite show! We're deep diving into the dynamics around the campfire and bringing you opinions hotter than the southern-hemi sun! Join Sam Thompson and Kemi Rodgers after I'm A Celebrity... South Africa every night for the juiciest debrief of an unmissable series!

trailers.title: GK Barry and Sinitta discuss Gemma Collin's return! | I'm A Celebrity... Unpacked | South Africa
